title: leptinella albida
intro: Leptinella albida, also known as white buttonweed, is a small annual plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leptinella albida include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Leptinella albida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
